info.description: dsxcad: CAD Collaboration Web corpus REST Services provided in 3DSpace service for CAD Files.
info.title: CAD Collaboration Web Services.

post.summary: Gets a download ticket for an existing Part authoring file
post.description: Gets a download ticket for an existing Part authoring file

parameters.name: ENO_CSRF_TOKEN
parameters.description: csrf token. You can get it from 3DSpace/resources/v1/application/CSRF

200.description: OK. The request has succeeded. The information returned with the response is dependent on the method used in the request, for example: GET an entity corresponding to the requested resource is sent in the response; HEAD the entity-header fields corresponding to the requested resource are sent in the response without any message-body; POST an entity describing or containing the result of the action; TRACE an entity containing the request message as received by the end server.

ticketURL.description: The URL that should be used to download the file

ticket.description: The ticket to use for download

filename.description: The file name of the file to download

jobticket.description: The parameters that should be used to download

400.description: BAD REQUEST. The request could not be understood by the server due to malformed syntax. The client SHOULD NOT repeat the request without modifications.

post.summary: Gets an upload ticket for an existing Part
post.description: Gets an upload ticket for an existing Part. This service should be used when files needs to be updated. The ticket will be valid to upload 2 files.

parameters.name: ENO_CSRF_TOKEN
parameters.description: csrf token. You can get it from 3DSpace/resources/v1/application/CSRF

200.description: OK. The request has succeeded. The information returned with the response is dependent on the method used in the request, for example: GET an entity corresponding to the requested resource is sent in the response; HEAD the entity-header fields corresponding to the requested resource are sent in the response without any message-body; POST an entity describing or containing the result of the action; TRACE an entity containing the request message as received by the end server.

ticketURL.description: The URL that should be used to upload

ticket.description: The ticket to use for upload to FCS. Each ticket is valid for the number of files mandatory for update: 2 for dsxcad:Part and 1 for dsxcad:Representation

jobticket.description: The parameters that should be used to upload

400.description: BAD REQUEST. The request could not be understood by the server due to malformed syntax. The client SHOULD NOT repeat the request without modifications.

post.description:
Gets an upload ticket for an existing object. This should be used to when files needs to be updated. 
The ticket will be valid to upload the number of files mandatory for update: 
2 for Part and 1 for CAD Specific Data

parameters.description: csrf token. You can get it from 3DSpace/resources/v1/application/CSRF
parameters.name: ENO_CSRF_TOKEN

jobticket.description: The parameters that should be used to upload

ticket.description: The ticket to use for upload to FCS. Each ticket is valid for the number of files mandatory for update: 2 for dsxcad:Part and 1 for dsxcad:Representation

ticketURL.description: The URL that should be used to upload

parameters.name: ENO_CSRF_TOKEN
parameters.description: csrf token. You can get it from 3DSpace/resources/v1/application/CSRF

parameters.description: Mask defining what will be returned. Default Mask is:dsmvxcad:xCADDrawingMask.Default

schema.example: Payload should be oneOf the payload available in the Schema Tab.
Response will be returned with oneOf mask available in the Schema Tab.

get.summary: Gets a indexed search result of Drawing
get.description: Gets a indexed search result of Drawing

parameters.name: $searchStr
parameters.description: A search text to find one or more items.

parameters.name: $mask
parameters.description: Mask defining what will be returned. Default Mask is:dsmvxcad:xCADDrawingMask.Default

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Represents the total number of items returned from the search, accepts a maximum value of 1000.

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Represents the number of items to skip (to be used along with $top query parameter)

400.description: BAD REQUEST. The request could not be understood by the server due to malformed syntax. The client SHOULD NOT repeat the request without modifications.

parameters.name: $mask

400.description: BAD REQUEST. The request could not be understood by the server due to malformed syntax. The client SHOULD NOT repeat the request without modifications.

get.summary: Gets a list of CAD Products from indexed search
get.description: Gets a list of CAD Products. By default, returns a total of up to 50 items, can be optionally increased up to 1000 items using $top query parameter. Recommendation: Use $searchStr query parameter for better performances

parameters.name: $searchStr
parameters.description: Provide a 3DEXPERIENCE search expression with a minimum of two characters. Note that this will run on indexed data only.</br>Example1 searchStr="FYD" OR (modified>"2021-09-01T00:00:00Z" AND modified<2021-09-23T00:00:00Z")</br>Example2 searchStr=[ds6wg:XP_VPMReference_Ext.Materiau]:(zinc)</br>Example3 searchStr="ARB" AND modified<2019-03-19T08:00:00.000Z"

parameters.name: $mask
parameters.description: Mask defining what will be returned. Default Mask is:dsmvxcad:xCADProductMask.Default

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Represents the total number of items returned from the search, accepts a maximum value of 1000.

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Represents the number of items to skip (to be used along with $top query parameter)

400.description: BAD REQUEST. The request could not be understood by the server due to malformed syntax. The client SHOULD NOT repeat the request without modifications.

parameters.name: $searchStr
parameters.description: Provide a 3DEXPERIENCE search expression with a minimum of two characters. Note that this will run on indexed data only.</br>Example1 searchStr="FYD" OR (modified>>"2021-09-01T00:00:00Z" AND modified<2021-09-23T00:00:00Z")</br>Example2 searchStr=[ds6wg:XP_VPMReference_Ext.Materiau]:(zinc)</br>Example3 searchStr="ARB" AND modified<2019-03-19T08:00:00.000Z"

parameters.name: $mask

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Represents the total number of items returned from the search, accepts a maximum value of 1000.

parameters.description: Represents the number of items to skip (to be used along with $top query parameter)

400.description: BAD REQUEST. The request could not be understood by the server due to malformed syntax. The client SHOULD NOT repeat the request without modifications.

post.summary: Locate a CAD Specific Data from an Engineering Item
post.description: Locate the CAD Specific Data from an Engineering Item by navigating the dependency link. Number of input objects must not exceed 2000. Output is limited to 2000 representations.

parameters.name: ENO_CSRF_TOKEN

parameters.description: A search text to find one or more items.

parameters.description: We can add several fields with comma(,) separator to get in the response.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Represents the total number of items returned from the search, accepts a maximum value of 1000.

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Represents the number of items to skip (to be used along with $top query parameter)

get.summary: Gets a list of CAD Shapes from indexed search
get.description: Gets a list of CAD Shapes. By default, returns a total of up to 50 items, can be optionally increased up to 1000 items using $top query parameter. Recommendation: Use $searchStr query parameter for better performances

parameters.name: $searchStr
parameters.description: Provide a 3DEXPERIENCE search expression with a minimum of two characters. Note that this will run on indexed data only.</br>Example1 searchStr="FYD" OR (modified>"2021-09-01T00:00:00Z" AND modified<"2021-09-23T00:00:00Z")</br>Example2 searchStr=[ds6wg:XP_VPMReference_Ext.Materiau]:(zinc)</br>Example3 searchStr="ARB" AND modified<"2019-03-19T08:00:00.000Z"

parameters.name: $mask
parameters.description: Mask defining what will be returned. Default Mask is:dsmvxcad:xCADShapeMask.Default

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Represents the total number of items returned from the search, accepts a maximum value of 1000.

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Represents the number of items to skip (to be used along with $top query parameter)

400.description: BAD REQUEST. The request could not be understood by the server due to malformed syntax. The client SHOULD NOT repeat the request without modifications.

parameters.name: $mask
parameters.description: Mask defining what will be returned. Default Mask is:dsmvxcad:xCADShapeMask.Default

schema.example: Response will be returned with oneOf mask available in the Schema Tab.
